github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text:
Follow the Conventional Commits specification. Use the format: '<type>(<scope>): <short summary in imperative mood>

<detailed body with bullet points explaining the WHY, not just the WHAT>

<footer for breaking changes or issue references>'. Types must be: feat, fix, refactor, docs, style, test, or chore. The scope should be the module or file category (e.g., 'auth', 'ui', 'api'). The body must explain the reasoning behind the logic changes.
